Qwen Image Edit 2511 Prompt — Bed Pose (Opposite Parallel, Close Together)

Use Reference Image 1 as woman 1.
Use Reference Image 2 as woman 2.

Two distinct human subjects. Independent skeletal structure. No anatomical fusion.
Clothing remains bound to each original person.

Pose:
Both women lying down on a bed surface, positioned very close together.

Bodies aligned in opposite parallel directions:

woman 1 facing one direction

woman 2 facing the opposite direction

Both resting on their stomach with upper chest lifted slightly upward using their forearms for support.

Shoulders and hips near each other, but bodies remain structurally separate.
No limb merging.
No overlapping torsos.

Leg alignment natural and relaxed.

Face & direction:
Both heads turned toward the camera.
Both looking directly at the camera.
Faces clearly visible.

Body proportions:
Maintain original:

height

limb length

shoulder width

waist and hips

silhouette

No reshaping or distortion.

Environment:
Soft bed setting. Clean bedding. Minimal background distraction.

Lighting:
Soft indoor lighting. Balanced exposure.
No over-bright highlights. Natural shadows.

Quality:
Ultra-sharp clarity.
No blur.
Entire frame in focus.
Photorealistic skin and fabric textures.

Use Reference Image 1 as the man.
Use Reference Image 2 as the woman.

Scene composition:
Create a realistic cinematic scene inside an empty subway train.

The woman (Reference Image 2) is standing in the middle area of the subway coach.

She is the main subject and framed in a closeup shot (upper body from head to crotch clearly visible).

She is facing toward the camera and looking at the camera.

The man (Reference Image 1) is sitting on a seat on the left side behind her, positioned back in the frame.

He should remain clearly visible, clearly in the background and seated naturally. No blurring face.

Framing & perspective:
Closeup composition focused on the woman.
Subway interior visible around her to establish environment.
Natural perspective and believable spacing between subjects.

Identity preservation (highest priority):

Preserve exact faces and identities from both reference images.

Facial details must remain pixel-perfect and unchanged.

Do not alter face shape, hairstyle, skin texture, or proportions.

Image quality:

Ultra-sharp clarity.

No depth of field. No blurring anywhere.

Entire frame in focus.

DSLR-quality, high-resolution photorealism.

Crisp textures on pole, seats, clothing, and skin.

Lighting & style:

Bright, even subway lighting.

Natural skin tones and realistic shadows.

Clean cinematic realism with accurate interior perspective.
